title: Student Management System
description: A Java application that manages student records using object-oriented principles.
longDescription: This project demonstrates core OOP concepts including classes, objects, encapsulation, and file handling. The system allows adding, updating, searching, and deleting student records.

title: Library Management System
description: A relational database system for managing books, users, and borrowing records.
longDescription: This project focuses on database design and SQL queries. It includes entity relationships, normalization, and query optimization.

title: Weather App (API Integration)
description: A Python application that fetches live weather data using an external API.
longDescription: This project introduces API consumption, JSON parsing, and GUI development using Tkinter.

title: Clinic Appointment Manager (Demo)
description: A demonstration C# application for scheduling appointments and managing basic patient queues.
longDescription: This fictional demonstration project shows how a student can present object-oriented design, validation, collections and a practical workflow without exposing private academic work.

title: Community Stock Tracker (Demo)
description: A demonstration inventory system for tracking products, quantities and stock movements.
longDescription: This fictional database project demonstrates relational design, structured queries, validation and reporting in a portfolio-friendly format.

title: Help Desk Ticket System (Demo)
description: A demonstration Java system for logging, prioritising and resolving technical-support tickets.
longDescription: This fictional project demonstrates Java classes, inheritance, collections, exception handling and clear problem-solving documentation.

title: Study Planner (Demo)
description: A demonstration Python application for organising modules, study sessions and deadlines.
longDescription: This fictional project shows how an emerging Python developer can present GUI design, input validation, data storage and usability decisions.
